npcs.name: Elder Maris
npcs.description: An elderly woman who has not yet lost her voice but feels it fading. She remembers fragments of old songs her grandmother taught her that may hold clues.
npcs.currentLocation: Thornhaven Village Square, where a silent crowd gathers around the dried-up Speaking Well, once the heart of community gatherings.

npcs.name: Finn the Keeper
npcs.description: A nervous young man who tends the village records. He discovered strange gaps in the historical documents before partially losing his memory.
npcs.currentLocation: Thornhaven Village Square, where a silent crowd gathers around the dried-up Speaking Well, once the heart of community gatherings.

npcs.name: Silent Sara
npcs.description: A child who lost her voice weeks ago. She communicates through drawings that depict strange symbols and a figure beneath the ground.
npcs.currentLocation: Thornhaven Village Square, where a silent crowd gathers around the dried-up Speaking Well, once the heart of community gatherings.

npcs.name: Elder Marris Blackwood
npcs.description: A weathered woman in her sixties who suspects the current troubles relate to her family's hidden history as one of the founding bloodlines.
npcs.currentLocation: Thornwatch, a valley farming community of 400 souls, known for its apple orchards and the ancient stone circle called the Founder's Ring on the hillside above town.

npcs.name: Finn Copperkettle
npcs.description: A jovial halfling who runs the Harvest Moon Inn and knows everyone's business, though he hides his own growing fear as his daughter fell victim to the sleeping curse.
npcs.currentLocation: Thornwatch, a valley farming community of 400 souls, known for its apple orchards and the ancient stone circle called the Founder's Ring on the hillside above town.

npcs.name: Sister Aldwen
npcs.description: A devoted cleric who tends the afflicted and maintains the town's small shrine, she has been researching old texts for answers and provides healing support.
npcs.currentLocation: Thornwatch, a valley farming community of 400 souls, known for its apple orchards and the ancient stone circle called the Founder's Ring on the hillside above town.

npcs.name: Garrett Stonefist
npcs.description: A stern dwarf veteran who organizes patrols and defenses but feels powerless against an enemy he cannot fight with steel alone.
npcs.currentLocation: Thornwatch, a valley farming community of 400 souls, known for its apple orchards and the ancient stone circle called the Founder's Ring on the hillside above town.

npcs.name: Sera Brightwind
npcs.description: An elderly half-elf who first noticed the vanishing stars and seeks brave souls to investigate the phenomenon.
npcs.currentLocation: Millhaven, a prosperous market town known for its observatory tower where the first star vanished three months ago.
notes: She asked the party to investigate the vanished stars.
Auto memory: Party agreed to help investigate the missing stars

npcs.name: Brother Aldric
npcs.description: A former member of the Eternal Circle who fled after realizing the true cost of their ritual and now hides in fear.
npcs.currentLocation: Millhaven, a prosperous market town known for its observatory tower where the first star vanished three months ago.

npcs.name: Captain Mira Stoneshield
npcs.description: A pragmatic dwarf captain initially skeptical of magical threats but becomes a valuable ally once convinced.
npcs.currentLocation: Millhaven, a prosperous market town known for its observatory tower where the first star vanished three months ago.

npcs.name: The Constellation Spirit
npcs.description: A mysterious being made of starlight who appears to those who prove themselves worthy, offering cryptic guidance.
npcs.currentLocation: Millhaven, a prosperous market town known for its observatory tower where the first star vanished three months ago.
